name: Seproxetine
description: Seproxetine, also known as (S)-norfluoxetine, is a selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor (SSRI). It is an active metabolite of fluoxetine. Seproxetine was being investigated by Eli Lilly as an antidepressant but development was never completed and the drug was never marketed.
mechanismOfAction: Seproxetine, also known as (S)-norfluoxetine, is a selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor (SSRI). It is an active metabolite of fluoxetine. Seproxetine was being investigated by Eli Lilly as an antidepressant but development was never completed and the drug was never marketed.

interactions.name: Bosutinib
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Bosutinib can be increased when it is combined with Seproxetine.

interactions.name: Ibrutinib
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Ibrutinib can be increased when it is combined with Seproxetine.

interactions.description: The serum concentration of Tolvaptan can be increased when it is combined with Seproxetine.
